input.command: kubectl get deploy spark-master spark-worker -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1
input.description: Get detailed YAML for both deployments

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-master","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-master"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-master","component":"master"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT\n/opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-master","ports":[{"containerPort":7077,"name":"spark"},{"containerPort":8080,"name":"webui"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T17:02:37Z"
    generation: 1
    name: spark-master
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "91235"
    uid: 22343d67-459f-40db-b7b4-2435c0d07fca
  spec:
    progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
    replicas: 1
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: spark-master
    strategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        maxSurge: 25%
        maxUnavailable: 25%
      type: RollingUpdate
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-master
          component: master
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            unset SPARK_MASTER_PORT
            /opt/spark/sbin/start-master.sh
            tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-master
          ports:
          - containerPort: 7077
            name: spark
            protocol: TCP
          - containerPort: 8080
            name: webui
            protocol: TCP
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
        serviceAccountName: spark-pi
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    availableReplicas: 1
    conditions:
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:15Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:15Z"
      message: Deployment has minimum availability.
      reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Available
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-24T17:02:38Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:15Z"
      message: ReplicaSet "spark-master-565c48478c" has successfully progressed.
      reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Progressing
    observedGeneration: 1
    readyReplicas: 1
    replicas: 1
    updatedReplicas: 1
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: Deployment
  metadata:
    annotations:
      deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-worker","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"spark-worker"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-worker","component":"worker"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","/opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077\ntail -f /opt/spark/logs/*\n"],"env":[{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY","value":"1G"},{"name":"SPARK_WORKER_CORES","value":"1"}],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-worker","ports":[{"containerPort":8081}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-06-24T17:02:38Z"
    generation: 1
    name: spark-worker
    namespace: spark-pi
    resourceVersion: "91221"
    uid: 7a595ee2-708f-428e-bc2c-1ed2421fab82
  spec:
    progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
    replicas: 1
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: spark-worker
    strategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        maxSurge: 25%
        maxUnavailable: 25%
      type: RollingUpdate
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: spark-worker
          component: worker
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/bash
          - -c
          - |
            /opt/spark/sbin/start-worker.sh spark://spark-master:7077
            tail -f /opt/spark/logs/*
          env:
          - name: SPARK_WORKER_MEMORY
            value: 1G
          - name: SPARK_WORKER_CORES
            value: "1"
          image: apache/spark:3.5.3
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: spark-worker
          ports:
          - containerPort: 8081
            protocol: TCP
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 200m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        serviceAccount: spark-pi
        serviceAccountName: spark-pi
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  status:
    availableReplicas: 1
    conditions:
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:10Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:10Z"
      message: Deployment has minimum availability.
      reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Available
    - lastTransitionTime: "2026-06-24T17:02:41Z"
      lastUpdateTime: "2026-06-24T17:03:10Z"
      message: ReplicaSet "spark-worker-79bcb76ffb" has successfully progressed.
      reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
      status: "True"
      type: Progressing
    observedGeneration: 1
    readyReplicas: 1
    replicas: 1
    updatedReplicas: 1
